description: Casting a nullable column preserves the nullable status in the output

columns.name: short_bio
columns.note: bio is nullable in schema, cast to varchar does not change nullability

name: cast_preserves_nullability
query_sql:
-- @name GetShortBio
-- @returns :one
SELECT bio::varchar(100) AS short_bio FROM users WHERE id = $1
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, bio TEXT, age INTEGER, score NUMERIC, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
